name: Kunkka
description: Step lively now, your Admiral is on board! Kunkka, the Admiral As The Admiral of the mighty Claddish Navy, Kunkka was charged with protecting the isles of his homeland when the demons of the Cataract made a concerted grab at the lands of men.

abilities.name: Admiral's Rum
abilities.description: Douses himself with the Admiral's signature rum upon taking additional player-based damage instances when reaching a certain health threshold. The Rum buff grants bonus movement speed and damage reduction for a period of time.

abilities.name: Torrent
abilities.description: Summons a rising torrent that, after a short delay, stuns and hurls enemy units into the sky.

abilities.name: Tidebringer
abilities.description: Grants increased damage and cleaves a large area of effect in front of Kunkka for a single strike. The slow does not affect enemy units.

abilities.name: X Marks the Spot
abilities.description: The Admiral's set of arcane abilities includes some that can be used for battle as well as entertainment.

abilities.name: Tidal Wave
abilities.description: Calls upon a tidal wave from behind Kunkka that deals damage, disarms, and drags enemy units along it.

abilities.name: Ghostship
abilities.description: Summons a ghostly ship that sails through the battle before smashing apart, damaging and stunning all enemies caught near the wreckage. Summons a fleet of Ghost ships on a 2.5 second interval. Each ship now also fires waves of cannonballs from the port and starboard side dealing part of Ghostship's damage as they pass through enemies.
